{{Infobox character
| name = Nurita
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nurita]] is [[Leah]]'s aunt.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nurita]] is a Myrian who has taken charge of the surviving villagers.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nurita]] has a niece who is [[Leah]]'s sister.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] spent two years with her aunt [[Nurita]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
